title: Dalton Introduces Himself
description: On pages 0–6, dalton introduces himself as dalton shelters the crew and explains Drum Island’s fall under Wapol while the search for the island’s last doctor continues.
scene: Dalton Introduces Himself. Dalton shelters the crew and explains Drum Island’s fall under Wapol while the search for the island’s last doctor continues. The focus is the story beat, character decisions, and dialogue driving this part.

dialogue.speaker: Dalton
dialogue.text: This country,

dialogue.speaker: Dalton
dialogue.text: has no name as of yet.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: A Nameless country?

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Is that even possible?

dialogue.speaker: Dalton
dialogue.text: gyana- Aaaa! It's a beaaa- aaaaar!

dialogue.speaker: Dalton
dialogue.text: Everyone play dead!

dialogue.speaker: Drum villager
dialogue.text: It's just a hiking bear.

dialogue.speaker: Dalton
dialogue.text: It poses no danger but mind your hiking manners and don't forget to bow.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Good,

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: All fixed up now!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Right?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Quick...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Now I can start training for real.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I was getting tired of only lifting heavier and heavier weights.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: And since just sitting here to keep an eye on the ship is boring...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I might as well do some meditating,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: While swimming in the cold water.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: the snowing town, "Big horn."

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: This is... our town.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: They got some weird animals walking around.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: A real snow country for sure!

dialogue.speaker: Dalton
dialogue.text: Nami, it's a town! We're finally at a town full of people!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Good work, everyone.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Those that aren't on guard-duty can now return to their normal jobs.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: You sure you can handle all of'em yourself, dalton? They are pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: They should pose no harm.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Or at least, that's what my reliable gut instinct tells me...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: ...this country doesn't have any professional soldiers, does it?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: No, they're all normal civilians.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: for the time being, come to my house.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Ah! Look, Luffy! A hiking bear!

dialogue.speaker: Drum villager
dialogue.text: Another one!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Dalton, I heard there were pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Is everything alright?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Rest assured, everything is under control, madam.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Dalton! I'll be looking forward to the elections in two days.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: H2 K2

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: every- one says they'll be voting for you.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: T-That's prepos- tenous!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I bear too many sins for such a position.

summary: This part centers on dalton introduces himself, clarifying the immediate conflict and how it moves the chapter toward its next major turn.
